audit_items.proof_trace: `_call` forwards all gas via `target.call(data)`, but both callers enforce strict access controls: `AuctionBidder._multiCall` is only reachable via `auctionCallback` which requires `msg.sender == s_auction && from == address(this)`, and `bid()` which populates the Call[] solution is `onlyRole(AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE)`; `WorkflowRouter.onReport` requires `FORWARDER_ROLE` and enforces a per-workflowId target+selector allowlist. No external attacker can inject arbitrary targets; the unbounded gas forwarding is intentional design for trusted bidder execution of pre-bid logic (documented in AuctionBidder docstring).
